official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound cooldown packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official cooldown body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound cooldown frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns cooldown immediately after cookie_request.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the cooldown id to ClientboundCooldownPacket.
The official cooldown body is Identifier cooldownGroup followed by VarInt duration.
The fixture uses Identifier.parse(String) and ClientboundCooldownPacket(Identifier, int), so it does not require an initialized item registry, player, level, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded cooldown group, decoded duration, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove item cooldown semantics, item registry contents, UI cooldown behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer item cooldown semantics, item registry contents, UI cooldown behavior, runtime Play entry, world load, spawn readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
